Hespera Renewables SE — Operational Incident Report (EU context; issuer on Nordhaven Exchange Regulated Market)
Incident date and scope: 2026-05-28; telemetry ingestion outage at processor DataQuarry BV affecting audit logs only; no customer content processing impacted.
Impact on personal data: none identified; GDPR Art 9 special-category flags remained pseudonymised; minimisation by default enforced with masked fields at source.
Data Export Approval DX-2041 authorised a one-off cross-border transfer of hashed device IDs to Syntrio Metrics LLC (Norlandia) under SCCs; the transfer was executed and closed.
DSAR status: no backlog; two requests resolved prior to the incident with erasure confirmed and audit trail stored in the EEA; no further action triggered by the outage.
Consent withdrawal handling: suppression list syncs completed; there were no failed revocations and no marketing sends occurred during the outage window.
Retention: no early deletion or over-retention observed; retention schedule R-17/HR and R-22/Telemetry unchanged and documented in DPA Schedule 2.
Vendor onboarding controls: Processor Due Diligence Form PDD-981 and DPA Schedule 3 (Subprocessor Annex) for DataQuarry BV were in place before go-live; security addendum requires EEA-only storage for production.
MNPI/MAR check: the outage and remediation were disclosed via a routine service bulletin posted on 2026-05-29; internal assessment found no inside information created and no trading blackout imposed.
Issuer context: Hespera Renewables SE shares admitted to trading on the Nordhaven Regulated Market; not price-sensitive under EU MAR Article 7 criteria.
Identifiers used below are placeholders only: LEI Z0HESP0000000000000 and ISIN XX00HESP0000 are invalid and provided for memo cross-reference.
CSRD/SFDR: no change to environmental KPIs or PAI indicators; energy intensity and GHG Scope 2 measures unaffected; incident recorded in CSRD working papers.
Cross-border transfer safeguards: EEA and UK processors used for production; any third-country export (e.g., Norlandia analytics) requires SCCs and a Transfer Risk Assessment; no automated export jobs were active during the outage.
Next steps: monitor ingestion stability, reconfirm retention job integrity, and re-validate consent logs; no corrective filings required with the competent authority in the Member State of Valoria.
Contact points: privacy-office@hespera-se.example and compliance@hespera-se.example are role mailboxes for follow-up; do not include customer names or account numbers in replies.
